items.title: Alex Caruso is now 2-4 from 3 tonight, making him 26-56 from deep in the playoffs after hitting just 29% in reg season. This is one of the biggest increases ever, very similar to Andrew Nembhard just last year (both ~29% to 46%)
items.author: Mike Lynch
items.body_excerpt: Alex Caruso is now 2-4 from 3 tonight, making him 26-56 from deep in the playoffs after hitting just 29% in reg season. This is one of the biggest increases ever, very similar to Andrew Nembhard just last year (both ~29% to 46%)
